creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text: I think that MooseFS's approach is the correct one.  Linux's behavior, if I understand correctly, makes it very vulnerable to DOSes, especially accidental ones.  I don't think that FreeBSD should strive to be bug-compatible with Linux in that regard.  So unless there are any other compelling reasons for us to change our behavior, I'm going to close this as "not a bug".
